# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateDashboardReport($pdo, $filters) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                r.*,
                u.username,
                u.email,
                c.category_name,
                s.status_name
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN statuses s ON r.status_id = s.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && is_array($filters['status'])) {
        $statusPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
            $key = ':status_' . $index;
            $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $status;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN (" . implode(',', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && is_array($filters['category'])) {
        $categoryPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
            $key = ':category_' . $index;
            $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $category;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['amount_min'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount >= :amount_min";
        $params[':amount_min'] = $filters['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['amount_max'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount <= :amount_max";
        $params[':amount_max'] = $filters['amount_max'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search OR u.username LIKE :search OR u.email LIKE :search)";
        $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['priority']) && is_array($filters['priority'])) {
        $priorityPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['priority'] as $index => $priority) {
            $key = ':priority_' . $index;
            $priorityPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $priority;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.priority IN (" . implode(',', $priorityPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['priority'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.priority = :priority";
        $params[':priority'] = $filters['priority'];
    }
    
    $allowedOrderColumns = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'amount', 'title', 'username', 'status_name', 'category_name', 'priority'];
    $orderBy = 'r.created_at';
    if (!empty($filters['order_by']) && in_array($filters['order_by'], $allowedOrderColumns)) {
        if (strpos($filters['order_by'], '.') === false) {
            $orderBy = 'r.' . $filters['order_by'];
        } else {
            $orderBy = $filters['order_by'];
        }
    }
    
    $orderDirection = 'DESC';
    if (!empty($filters['order_direction']) && in_array(strtoupper($filters['order_direction']), ['ASC', 'DESC'])) {
        $orderDirection = strtoupper($filters['order_direction']);
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY " . $orderBy . " " . $orderDirection;
    
    if (!empty($filters['limit'])) {
        $limit = (int)$filters['limit'];
        $sql .= " LIMIT " . $limit;
        
        if (!empty($filters['offset'])) {
            $offset = (int)$filters['offset'];
            $sql .= " OFFSET " . $offset;
        }
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportSummary($pdo, $filters) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                COUNT(*) as total_count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount,
                MIN(r.amount) as min_amount,
                MAX(r.amount) as max_amount,
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) as unique_users,
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.category_id) as unique_categories
            FROM reports r
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && is_array($filters['status'])) {
        $statusPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
            $key = ':status_' . $index;
            $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $status;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN (" . implode(',', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && is_array($filters['category'])) {
        $categoryPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
            $key = ':category_' . $index;
            $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $category;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)";
        $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportByCategory($pdo, $filters) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                c.category_name,
                c.id as category_id,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && is_array($filters['status'])) {
        $statusPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
            $key = ':status_' . $index;
            $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $status;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN (" . implode(',', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY count DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportByStatus($pdo, $filters) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                s.status_name,
                s.id as status_id,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN statuses s ON r.status_id = s.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && is_array($filters['category'])) {
        $categoryPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
            $key = ':category_' . $index;
            $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $category;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY s.id, s.status_name ORDER BY count DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function getReportByDateRange($pdo, $filters, $groupBy = 'day') {
    $dateFormat = [
        'day' => '%Y-%m-%d',
        'week' => '%Y-%u',
        'month' => '%Y-%m',
        'year' => '%Y'
    ];
    
    $format = $dateFormat[$groupBy] ?? $dateFormat['day'];
    
    $sql = "SELECT 
                DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '$format') as period,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
            FROM reports r
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && is_array($filters['status'])) {
        $statusPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
            $key = ':status_' . $index;
            $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $status;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN (" . implode(',', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id = :status";
        $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && is_array($filters['category'])) {
        $categoryPlaceholders = [];
        foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
            $key = ':category_' . $index;
            $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = $category;
        }
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
    } elseif (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id = :category";
        $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY period ORDER BY period ASC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

function exportReportToCSV($pdo, $filters, $filename = 'report.csv') {
    $data = generateDashboardReport($pdo, $filters);
    
    header('Content-Type: text/csv');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $filename . '"');
    
    $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');
    
    if (!empty($data)) {
        fputcsv($output, array_keys($data[0]));
        
        foreach ($data as $row) {
            fputcsv($output, $row);
        }
    }
    
    fclose($output);
    exit;
}

$filters = [
    'date_from' => $_POST['date_from'] ?? null,
    'date_to' => $_POST['date_to'] ?? null,
    'status' => $_POST['status'] ?? null,
    'category' => $_POST['category'] ?? null,
    'user_id' => $_POST['user_id'] ?? null,
    'amount_min' => $_POST['amount_min'] ?? null,
    'amount_max' => $_POST['amount_max'] ?? null,
    'search' => $_POST['search'] ?? null,
    'priority' => $_POST['priority'] ?? null,
    'order_by' => $_POST['order_by'] ?? 'created_at',
    'order_direction' => $_POST['order_direction'] ?? 'DESC',
    'limit' => $_POST['limit'] ?? 100,
    'offset' => $_POST['offset'] ?? 0
];

try {
    $pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=dashboard;charset=utf8mb4', 'username', 'password', [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false
    ]);
    
    $reports = generateDashboardReport($pdo, $filters);
    $summary = getReportSummary($pdo, $filters);
    $categoryBreakdown = getReportByCategory($pdo, $filters);
    $statusBreakdown = getReportByStatus($pdo, $filters);
    $timeSeriesData = getReportByDateRange($pdo, $filters, $_POST['group_by'] ?? 'day');
    
    if (isset($_POST['export']) && $_POST['export'] === 'csv') {
        exportReportToCSV($pdo, $filters, 'dashboard_report_' . date('Y-m-d') . '.csv');
    }
    
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    error_log('Database error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    die('An error occurred while generating the report.');
}

?>
